antipattern.symptom: Module pattern: one default export + maybe one named export.
antipattern.root-cause: Tutorial habit; copied React idiom into general code.
antipattern.fix: Convert to all-named exports; framework files exempted explicitly.

antipattern.symptom: .eslintrc.* file present alongside eslint.config.js; lint behaviour ambiguous.
antipattern.fix: Delete .eslintrc.* files; commit; ensure CI uses ESLint 9.

antipattern.symptom: Browser bundle imports `node:fs` or `process`; runtime crash on load.
antipattern.root-cause: Author shared utility file between runtimes without a marker.
antipattern.fix: Apply rule runtime-targeted-placement: rename to `*.node.ts`; create browser-safe sibling.
